Kassanda District · Kyakatebbe · Uganda

Seesa High School

A secondary school built into the hillside above Kassanda's farmland — where the whole school still gathers together every single morning.

Plan a Visit See the Campus
SCROLL
Welcome

Tucked into the hills of Kyakatebbe

Seesa High School sits on a quiet rise above Kassanda's farmland, walled in among sugarcane fields, banana gardens and pine trees. From the air, the campus looks almost like a small village of its own — red-roofed blocks arranged around a packed-earth assembly ground.

That assembly ground is where school life actually happens. Every day starts the same way: hundreds of students in white, orange and navy lining up shoulder to shoulder outside the Administration Block, long before any lesson begins. It's less a hallway-and-classroom school and more a school built around its open ground — gathering, lining up, moving together.

"Wishes you a safe journey"

— painted across the gate sign, for everyone who passes through it

Seesa High School
Kassanda · Kyakatebbe
Life Here

What a day actually looks like

Three things that show up in almost every photo from this campus.

01 — COMMUNITY

Morning assembly, every day

The full school gathers outside the Administration Block before lessons start — a daily routine that turns the whole compound into one shared space.

02 — LEADERSHIP

Responsibility, worn visibly

Prefects and student leaders step out in navy blazers — a small detail that says a lot about how seriously leadership is treated here.

03 — SETTING

Countryside on every side

Walled in, red-roofed, and surrounded by sugarcane and forest — the campus is a clear landmark in the middle of Kassanda's open countryside.

Wishes You A Safe Journey

SEESA HIGH SCHOOL

Our Crest

One crest, every blazer

The same crest sits on the front gate sign and on every blazer pocket across campus — it's the one piece of branding that ties the whole school together, from the youngest student to the staff at the Administration Block.

Its colours carry straight through the school's everyday look: the sky blue of the gate sign and the prefects' shirts, the gold trim of the crest itself, and the navy worn by school leaders.

Visit Us

Come see it for yourself

Photos only go so far — Seesa High School is easiest to understand standing on the assembly ground itself, in Kyakatebbe, Kassanda District. Reach out below and the school office will help arrange a visit.
